message:
Prevent orphaned child processes, distribute workload migrations evenly, and fix unstable Duration methods in tests

vc_collect (executor):
- Add kill_on_drop(true) to both local and SSH command spawns to
  ensure child processes are killed when the executor is dropped
  due to timeout or cancellation, preventing orphaned processes

vc_guardian (autopilot):
- Use .iter().cycle() instead of .first() when selecting migration
  targets for overloaded machines, distributing load across all
  underutilized machines in round-robin fashion instead of piling
  everything onto the first one

vc_oracle (rate_limit):
- Replace Duration::from_hours() and Duration::from_mins() with
  Duration::from_secs() equivalents in 6 test functions to avoid
  depending on unstable/nightly-only Duration constructors

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
